title: malus sylvestris var. rhodopaea
intro: Malus sylvestris var. rhodopaea, also known as the Balkan apple or Macedonian apple, is a species of apple native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Greece. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Malus sylvestris var. rhodopaea include reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
